spec_match.rationale: Demo exercises the core API surface — every title keyword (smart) and 3 summary keywords appear directly in the page.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive surface: 4 form controls wired to ~2824 chars of script that mutate the page state.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept lede does not share vocabulary with the feature-index blurb; readers landing from /features will find a mismatched framing.

edge_cases.rationale: Page feature-detects the API and shows both the supported and unsupported branches (try/catch + missing-API messaging).

references.rationale: Page links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/6411735804674048 directly in the see-also / references section.

design_system.rationale: All colours flow through CSS variables, no raw hex, and button overrides keep colour and background in sync.

openQuestions.title: Rewrite the lede to match the feature-index blurb
openQuestions.detail: Visitors arriving from /v141/web-smart-card-api/ expect the framing shown there. Right now the lede on this concept page reads independently and the keyword overlap is zero — pick up the verbs and nouns the index uses so the two read as continuous.

summary: 1 rubric fails — the open questions list the must-fix items before this page is ready to ship.
